source: Wisconsin Circuit Court Access (official per-case RSS feeds)
disclaimer: Information here is drawn from Wisconsin Circuit Court Access (WCCA) and Wausau Pilot & Review reporting. It is not the official court record and may lag the court file. The official custodian of circuit court records is the Clerk of Circuit Court in the county where the case was filed.
presumptionNote: A criminal charge is an accusation. Every defendant is presumed innocent unless and until proven guilty.

cases.headline: Wausau man pleads not guilty to bail jumping, disorderly conduct charges
cases.summary: Robert Edward Dewayne Stevens Jr., 46, of Wausau, is charged with two misdemeanor counts of bail jumping and one count of disorderly conduct with a domestic abuse modifier, filed March 17. He pleaded not guilty and was released on a $150 cash bond with sobriety and pretrial monitoring conditions.

nextHearing.note: Judicial pretrial, Branch 3, 10:40 a.m., Judge LaMont Jacobson

updates.note: Criminal complaint filed; Stevens pleaded not guilty at his initial appearance and cash bond was set at $150 with sobriety and pretrial monitoring conditions.
Pretrial conference held; judicial pretrial scheduled for Sept. 30.

cases.headline: Battery charge dismissed, disorderly conduct sentence deferred for Marathon County supervisor
cases.summary: A Marathon County supervisor was censured after his arrest on domestic abuse charges was brought forward.
